headline: Aptiv PLC (APTV) Reveals Advanced Occupancy Classification System Launch
summary: Aptiv PLC (NYSE:APTV) is one of the 10 best electric and autonomous driving stocks to buy according to hedge funds. On June 8, Aptiv PLC (NYSE:APTV) announced the launch of its Advanced Occupancy Classification system, marking the industry’s first occupant detection solution powered entirely by an in-cabin camera. The newly introduced software solution leverages artificial […]
